strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum experience requirement
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform used by NGOs and professionals
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, only a Bachelor's in Computer Science
Limited evidence of direct leadership in AI strategy or cloud product differentiation at a Principal Engineer level
No explicit mention of advising strategic customers/partners on AI adoption or recognized expertise in AI-powered products
response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience requirement and shows entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, but lacks a Master's/PhD in AI and has limited evidence of Principal-level AI strategy leadership. While they contribute to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, the resume does not demonstrate recognized expertise in AI products or advising strategic partners, which are critical for this role. Their technical breadth is strong, but depth in AI/cloud strategy is unproven.
